title: AI Settings
description: Configure the model used for AI features. Available via Zedi's AI server.
serverModeHelp: Uses Zedi's AI server. Some models are only available on Pro plans.
useOwnKeyDescription: Set your own API key to use all models without limits.
modelsAvailableAfterTest: Available models will appear after a connection test
resetConfirmDescription: Your saved API key and all settings will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
modelsEmpty: The API responded but returned no models. Check that ai_models are registered in the database behind VITE_API_BASE_URL.
claudeCodeDesktopRequired: Claude Code is only available in the desktop app
claudeCodeDescription: An AI assistant with advanced capabilities including file operations and command execution.
modeDefaultDescription: Uses Zedi's AI server. No API key required.
modeApiKeyDescription: Set your own API key to use all models without limits.
modeClaudeCodeDescription: Use the Claude Code agent (desktop app only).

prereq.title: Prerequisites check
prereq.allPassed: All prerequisites are met. Claude Code is ready to use.
prereq.desktopDescription: Must be running in the Zedi desktop app (Tauri).
prereq.desktopFail: Not available in the web browser. Please use the desktop app.
prereq.cliDescription: The claude command must be installed.
prereq.cliFail: claude command not found. Install with: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
prereq.sidecarDescription: Must be able to communicate with the Claude Code background process.
prereq.sidecarFail: Could not connect to the sidecar. Try restarting the app.

mcp.title: MCP Server Settings
mcp.description: Manage MCP servers to integrate external services (GitHub, Supabase, etc.).
mcp.deleteConfirmDescription: "{{name}}" will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
mcp.noServersDescription: Click "Add Server" to register a server.
mcp.importNone: No servers to import (all already registered or config file not found)
